title: Worldpay from FIS Announces The Prince's Trust as Official Charity Partner in the UK
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--FIS® (NYSE: FIS), a global leader in financial services technology, has joined The Prince's Trust as an official charity partner in the UK to help young people build the confidence and skills they need to reach their full potential.

title: New Strong Sell Stocks for February 16th
text: FIS, DNUT and MLM have been added to the Zacks Rank #5 (Strong Sell) List on February 16, 2023.

title: Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC Notifies Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS) Investors of Investigation
text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $FIS #classaction--Attorney Advertising--Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC is investigating potential claims on behalf of investors of Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (“Fidelity” or “the Company”) (NYSE: FIS). Fidelity investors are encouraged to obtain additional information and assist the investigation by visiting the firm's site: www.bgandg.com/fis. The investigation concerns whether Fidelity violated federal securities laws.

title: Fidelity National Information Services: Slowdown Only A Minor Issue
text: FIS has the slight advantage of having more currencies available for their merchants and charging them less per transaction. Total Merchant Solutions revenue has been mainly driven by the increase in transaction volumes to a forecasted 45.7 bln transactions in 2022 at an average of 7.2%.

title: A ‘lost opportunity' or a value play? FIS spinoff draws strong opinions.
text: Fidelity National Information Services Inc. remains a controversial story on Wall Street in the wake of spinoff plans that helped send shares plunging to one of their worst days on record yesterday.

title: Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS) Q4 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (NYSE:FIS ) Q4 2022 Earnings Conference Call February 13, 2023 8:30 AM ET Company Participants George Mihalos - Head, Investor Relations Stephanie Ferris - Chief Executive Officer and President Erik Hoag - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Tien-Tsin Huang - JP Morgan Rayna Kumar - UBS Lisa Ellis - MoffettNathanson Dave Koning - Baird Jason Kupferberg - Bank of America Darrin Peller - Wolfe Research John Davis - Raymond James David Togut - Evercore ISI Ashwin Shirvaikar - Citi Ramsey El-Assal - Barclays Dan Dolev - Mizuho Operator Good day and welcome to the FIS Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. [Operator Instructions] Please be advised that today's conference is being recorded.

title: FIS Stock Alert: What to Know as Fidelity National Plans to Spin Off Worldpay
text: Glaringly, during a solid showing on Wall Street, financial technology (fintech) provider Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE: FIS ) suffered a terrible case of the Monday blues. Earlier this morning, news broke that the company would spin off its merchant payments business Worldpay.

title: Fidelity National Information Services sags on 1Q outlook as it beats on fiscal 2022 4Q earnings
text: Fidelity National Information Services (NYSE:FIS)'s shares sank after it reported fourth-quarter 2022 revenue and earnings that beat expectations but fell short on its outlook for the first quarter of 2023.  The global provider of banking and payments technology solutions, processing services and information-based services said revenue grew by 1% to about $3.7 billion for the three months to December 31, 2022, from a year earlier.

title: Why Fidelity National Information Services Stock Dropped 15% Today
text: Fidelity National made an ill-considered acquisition four years ago. Today, it's paying the price.

title: Fidelity National (FIS) Q4 Earnings Beat on Banking Business
text: Fidelity National's (FIS) fourth-quarter results reflect sound contributions from its Banking and Capital Markets businesses. Management announces plan to spin off its Merchant Solutions unit.

title: FIS Banks on Embedded Finance, Spinoff to Jump-Start Merchant Business Growth
text: FIS is banking on embedded finance and loyalty programs to re-ignite growth in its merchant business. Earnings for the payments giant came two days earlier than expected, and the data show slowing growth rates across key business lines, but a plan to “invest more aggressively” to bolster its growth trajectory is taking shape.

title: Here's What Key Metrics Tell Us About Fidelity National (FIS) Q4 Earnings
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Fidelity National (FIS) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended December 2022, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) Q4 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: Fidelity National (FIS) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0.59% and 0.83%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Fidelity National Stock Sinks. It Will Spin Off Worldpay and Issues Guidance Miss
text: The Worldpay spinoff comes after the company announced a strategic review of its business and operations in December under new CEO Stephanie Ferris.

title: FIS Reports Fourth Quarter and Full-Year 2022 Results
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--FIS® (NYSE:FIS), a global leader in financial services technology, today reported its fourth quarter and full-year 2022 results. "We delivered fourth quarter results consistent with our expectations in our Banking and Capital Markets businesses.

title: FIS Announces Plans to Spin Off Merchant Business
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--FIS® (NYSE: FIS or “the Company”), a global leader in financial services technology, today announced plans to pursue a tax-free spin-off of its Merchant Solutions business to strengthen its strategic and operational focus, capitalize on growth opportunities and unlock shareholder value. The two companies expect to maintain a strong commercial relationship, preserving a key value proposition for clients of both businesses.

title: FIS to Spin Off Worldpay Merchant Services Business Acquired in 2019
text: FIS is reportedly planning to spin off Worldpay, the merchant services business it acquired in 2019. The payments giant is apparently looking to undertake a tax-free spinoff of its merchant operations, the bulk of which comes from Worldpay, Reuters reported Friday (Feb. 10), citing sources with knowledge of the matter.

title: FIS Announces Date Change For Fourth Quarter Earnings to February 13, 2023
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--FIS® (NYSE: FIS), a global leader in financial services technology, today announced that it has changed its earnings release date for fourth quarter 2022 financial results to Mon., Feb. 13, 2023, prior to market open. The company will sponsor a live webcast of its earnings conference call with the investment community beginning at 8:30 a.m. (EST) the same day. To access the webcast, go to the Investor Relations section of FIS' homepage, www.fisglobal.com.

title: Fidelity National (FIS) to Post Q4 Earnings: What to Expect
text: Fidelity National's (FIS) fourth-quarter results are likely to reflect higher profits from Capital Market Solutions.

title: FIS to Report Fourth Quarter Earnings on February 15, 2023
text: JACKSONVILLE, Fla.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--FIS ® (NYSE: FIS), a global leader in financial services technology, will announce fourth quarter 2022 financial results on Wed., Feb. 15, 2023, prior to market open.

title: FIS Cuts 2,600 Jobs During ‘Comprehensive Assessment' of Business
text: FIS has reportedly laid off 2,600 employees and contractors in recent weeks. The cuts amount to 2% of the FinTech's workforce, according to a Thursday (Feb. 2) Bloomberg report that cited unnamed sources.
